commit_message: [POL-509][librarian] Reconcile POLARIS.md/SUMMARY.md for QC repair-loop finalize handoff

polaris_md_updates.change_summary: Added unusable-output to the provider failure-reason list (POL-512) and fixed auth-failure/unavailable-provider naming; corrected repair-loop terminal state names to match QcRepairLoopOutcome literals in src/loop/checkpoint.ts.

Rewrote QC repair loop relationship section to document validateQcRepairLoopGate() (Step 5.9), validateAuthoritativeChildState() (Step 5.10), and warnOnMissingQcArtifacts(), replacing stale aspirational terminal-outcome naming (POL-511).

Replaced speculative qc_repair_rounds field description with the actually-implemented qc_repair_outcome/qc_repair_manifests fields and documented QcRunPointer.availability + pruneMissingQcRunPointers() (POL-513).

Documented the post-dispatch budget-exhausted guard fix (POL-510): the check is skipped once open_children is empty so a fully completed cluster always reaches cluster-complete/QC repair-loop handling.

summary_md_updates.change_summary: Added key-behavior bullets for the new QC repair-loop gate and authoritative completed-child cross-check introduced by POL-511/POL-514.
Added key-behavior bullet noting the post-dispatch budget-exhausted check is skipped once open_children is empty (POL-510).

blockers.description: smartdocs/specs/active/quality-control-architecture.md §8.6-8.7 use verbose terminal-outcome names (qc_passed, max_rounds_reached, operator_review_required, medic_referral_required) that do not match the hyphenated string literals actually implemented in src/loop/checkpoint.ts's QcRepairLoopOutcome (pass, max-rounds, operator-review, medic-referral) and used by src/finalize/index.ts's validateQcRepairLoopGate(). §8.9 of the same spec already uses the correct hyphenated forms. Per Librarian authority precedence, spec/doctrine content was not edited; POLARIS.md files were reconciled to point to §8.9 instead. Recommend an operator-approved edit to align §8.6-8.7 naming with §8.9 and the implementation.

evidence_summary: Reconciled 4 POLARIS.md and 2 SUMMARY.md files across src/qc, src/finalize, src/cluster-state, and src/loop to match behavior actually implemented by POL-510 through POL-514: the unusable-output QC failure classification, the new QC repair-loop finalize gate and authoritative child-count cross-check, the real qc_repair_outcome/qc_repair_manifests cluster-state fields and QC artifact availability tracking, and the post-dispatch budget-exhausted guard fix. No smartdocs/raw candidates in the packet were relevant to this cluster's technical content, so no ingestion/archival/YAML actions were needed. No links were broken. One non-blocking spec/implementation terminal-outcome naming conflict was surfaced for operator review; POLARIS.md files were pointed at the correct spec section (§8.9) instead of editing spec content. All changes committed in a single librarian commit; no implementation, runtime state, or telemetry files were touched.
